title: helictotrichon besseri
intro: Helictotrichon besseri, also known as Bess's silver grass, is a type of ornamental grass belonging to the Poaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and infections. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and even exhibiting antifungal and antioxidant properties. Helictotrichon besseri can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
